subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! The lamp hath been beset by the winds of malice and hatred. Where is the glass of Thy protection, O Protector [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی قد احاطت المصباح اریاح الغل و البغضاء این زجاجه حفظک یا حفاظ
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for protection, @justice and wrath of God
